subject: Fermi GBM trigger 589060361/190901828 is not a GRB
body:
B. Mailyan (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 589060361/190901828 at
19:52:36.15 UT on 1 September 2019,
tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger
is an accidental."

For Fermi GBM data and info, please visit the official Fermi GBM Support
Page:
https://fermi.gsfc.nasa.gov/ssc/data/access/gbm/
